programs.title: Big Backyard Quiz
programs.desc: In this episode of BBQ, team captains Ernie Dingo and Naomi Wenitong compete alongside Lizzy Hoo, Peter Rowsthorn, Luke McGregor and Diana Nguyen, with hosts Narelda Jacobs and Steven Oliver.

programs.title: Nitv On The Road: Boomerang Festival
programs.desc: Boomerang is a festival held in Byron Bay over the Easter long weekend. Run by Rhoda Roberts, the creator of the Dreaming Festival, it's a mixture of Australian and International Indigenous Acts.

programs.title: Bamay
programs.sub_title: North Stradbroke Island, Quandamooka Country Part 1
programs.desc: Slow TV is back on NITV with more beautiful Bamay. Bamay III celebrates great Australian islands and saltwater country. Sit back and relax with the healing powers of country.
